creator: vasya.akulov@gmail.com
text:
** Port marked as IGNORE: mail/postfix:
        wait for a new VDA patch that works with 2.6.2
** Listing the failed packages (-:ignored / *:skipped / !:failed)
        - mail/postfix (marked as IGNORE)

But on official site of VDA patch exist.
It exists 9 days.

http://vda.sourceforge.net/VDA/

Fix: 

Maintainer must fix the port.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/mail/postfix
set VDA checkbox
make install
